docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, SANDRA MACLEOD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A MINER MIRACLE (MINER, KATHY) $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,204.92, UPON PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF IS TO TURN OVER THE MATERIAL WRITTEN BY HER ON THIS PROJECT TO DEFENDANT IF SHE IS REQUESTED TO DO SO.
